body_txt: Yeah, that's what we call Cuteness Overload note or Cuteness Proximity if you prefer to call it this way . Cuteness Overload is the state in which a character experiences the immense rush of emotion after seeing (or hearing) something very, very cute, often rendering them partly or wholly incapacitated. The sudden charge of feelings could create so effective an incapacitation that they may have to be woken up by another character calling their name or by other means . Depending on the situation, it shares some traits with Heroic BSoD , but the main difference is an exposure to cuteness rather than a traumatic event. Moe , Ridiculously Cute Critters , and Kawaisa are common culprits. There is also moebetes, a slang term formed from the words Moe and diabetes , which has similar traits. This is more for anime and/or manga where someone is exposed to such great amounts of moe cuteness that they end up with constantly high moe levels, similar to how a diabetic has high blood sugar. Often strikes the serious man among a group, helping to make them seem Not So Above It All . Also a good way to show that a Badass character is a big softie at heart . It may result in I'm Taking Her Home with Me! . See also Cute Aggression for acting playfully aggressively as a response to cuteness. Most certainly Truth in Television .
